_comment: Vendor/paper-reported metrics, each measured on the MODEL'S OWN benchmark (largely DIRECT / in-distribution prompt injection). These are CITED reference values ONLY — they are NOT measured on this repo's real indirect-injection (LLMail-Inject) data and are never mixed into our measured ASR/recall bars. Shown solely to illustrate the distribution-shift gap.
metric: attack recall = fraction of attacks detected (= 1 - ASR)

entries.benchmark: 20k held-out prompts (model card, post-training / OOD); F1 0.9549. Own eval set: Acc/F1 0.9993.
private jailbreak eval, recall @ 1% FPR (English); AUC 0.998. AgentDojo attack-prevention 0.812 @ 3% utility drop.
